title: primula × wettsteinii
intro: Primula × wettsteinii, also known as Wettstein's Primrose, is a hybrid plant species in the family Primulaceae, resulting from the cross between Primula elatior and Primula palinura. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Primula × wettsteinii include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate coughs and congestion, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal remedies, such as capsules, tinctures, and essential oils.
